title: Conformity.
content:
Conformity was ever known
    A foe to dissolution:
    Nor can we that a ruin call,
    Whose crack gives crushing unto all.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Conformity.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
